description_long: This trash bin features a rectangular, upright design with a predominantly blue body adorned with whimsical white cloud patterns, reminiscent of the Toy Story aesthetic. The bin is framed by sturdy white side panels that extend slightly above the top, providing structural support and a modern look. The top section appears to have a swing or flap lid, indicated by the black triangular markings and a visible seam, allowing for easy waste disposal while keeping contents concealed. The front and back panels are identical, both decorated with the same cloud motif, while the sides are plain white. The bin stands on two flat, rectangular feet for stability, and there are no visible handles or wheels. The overall construction suggests a durable, weather-resistant material suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A blue, rectangular trash bin with white cloud patterns, white side panels, and a swing-style lid. It has a playful design and is built for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue panel with cloud patterns and the swing lid with black markings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white side panel and the curved top without visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, with blue panel, cloud patterns, and swing lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain white side panel and curved top.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: decorative cloud patterns, no waste type labels or instructions
